creator: sawp@sawp.com.br
text:
The diff changes:


diff -ruN /usr/ports/deskutils/x-tile/Makefile /home/pedrogarcia/workspace/ports/x-tile/1.8.4/port/x-tile/Makefile
--- /usr/ports/deskutils/x-tile/Makefile	2010-11-18 14:12:37.000000000 -0200
+++ /home/pedrogarcia/workspace/ports/x-tile/1.8.4/port/x-tile/Makefile	2010-12-13 11:25:36.000000000 -0200
@@ -1,24 +1,26 @@
 # New ports collection makefile for:	x-tile
-# Date created:		2010-09-17
+# Date created:		2010-12-13
 # Whom:			Pedro Garcia Freitas <sawp@sawp.com.br>
 #
-# $FreeBSD: ports/deskutils/x-tile/Makefile,v 1.1 2010/11/18 16:12:37 pav Exp $
+# $FreeBSD$
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	x-tile
-PORTVERSION=	1.8.1
+PORTVERSION=	1.8.4
 CATEGORIES=	deskutils devel python
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.sawp.com.br/share/xtile/
 
 MAINTAINER=	sawp@sawp.com.br
-COMMENT=	A GNOME applet to tile the opened windows
+COMMENT=	A Gnome Applet to Tile the Opened Windows
 
 USE_GNOME=	pygtk2
 USE_PYTHON=	yes
 USE_PYDISTUTILS=	yes
 PYDISTUTILS_EGGINFO=	X_Tile-${PYDISTUTILS_PKGVERSION}-${PYTHON_VERSION:S/thon//}.egg-info
 
+.include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
+
 post-patch:
-	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -i "" -e 's|: docfiles|: []|g' ${WRKSRC}/setup.py
+	${REINPLACE_CMD} -i "" -e 's|: docfiles|: []|g' ${WRKSRC}/setup.py
 
-.include <bsd.port.mk>
+.include <bsd.port.post.mk>
diff -ruN /usr/ports/deskutils/x-tile/distinfo /home/pedrogarcia/workspace/ports/x-tile/1.8.4/port/x-tile/distinfo
--- /usr/ports/deskutils/x-tile/distinfo	2010-11-18 14:12:37.000000000 -0200
+++ /home/pedrogarcia/workspace/ports/x-tile/1.8.4/port/x-tile/distinfo	2010-12-13 11:25:36.000000000 -0200
@@ -1,2 +1,3 @@
-SHA256 (x-tile-1.8.1.tar.gz) = e828ad4b918d0bfddce1ddfd6648c297b91edfa65ab08ac5c8a402180f57483b
-SIZE (x-tile-1.8.1.tar.gz) = 171631
+MD5 (x-tile-1.8.4.tar.gz) = 5bbe2df7efe9963eb5a74ad3b5afa305
+SHA256 (x-tile-1.8.4.tar.gz) = 696ec6c37b325a89bf7b62468606a83cf8a2b32506b6e7dce15e366cd089f2a4
+SIZE (x-tile-1.8.1.tar.gz) = 116003
diff -ruN /usr/ports/deskutils/x-tile/pkg-descr /home/pedrogarcia/workspace/ports/x-tile/1.8.4/port/x-tile/pkg-descr
--- /usr/ports/deskutils/x-tile/pkg-descr	2010-11-18 14:12:37.000000000 -0200
+++ /home/pedrogarcia/workspace/ports/x-tile/1.8.4/port/x-tile/pkg-descr	2010-12-13 11:25:36.000000000 -0200
@@ -1,7 +1,4 @@
-X-tile is a gnome applet for your panel (or optionally a standalone
-application, working with kde as well) that allows you to select a number of
-windows and tile them in different ways.  This is especially useful for
-comparing products in separate web pages, or for programmers refering to
-documentation as they are programming.
+X-tile is a gnome applet for your panel (or optionally a standalone application, working with kde as well) that allows you to select a number of windows and tile them in different ways.
+This is especially useful for comparing products in separate web pages, or for programmers refering to documentation as they are programming.
 
-WWW: http://www.giuspen.com/x-tile/
+www.giuspen.com/x-tile/
diff -ruN /usr/ports/deskutils/x-tile/pkg-plist /home/pedrogarcia/workspace/ports/x-tile/1.8.4/port/x-tile/pkg-plist
--- /usr/ports/deskutils/x-tile/pkg-plist	2010-11-18 14:12:37.000000000 -0200
+++ /home/pedrogarcia/workspace/ports/x-tile/1.8.4/port/x-tile/pkg-plist	2010-12-13 11:25:36.000000000 -0200
@@ -1,13 +1,12 @@
 bin/x-tile
 lib/bonobo/servers/x-tile.server
+lib/python2.6/site-packages/X_Tile-1.8.4-py2.6.egg-info

 share/x-tile/glade/tile-custom-2-set.svg
-share/x-tile/glade/tile-custom-exe.svg
-share/x-tile/glade/tile-custom-set.svg
 share/x-tile/glade/tile-horizontally.svg
 share/x-tile/glade/tile-quad.svg
 share/x-tile/glade/tile-triangle-down.svg
@@ -33,7 +30,6 @@
 share/x-tile/glade/unmaximize-checked-windows.svg
 share/x-tile/glade/vbuttonbox.png
 share/x-tile/glade/x-tile.glade
-share/x-tile/glade/x-tile.glade.h
 share/x-tile/glade/x-tile.svg
 share/x-tile/modules/cons.py
 share/x-tile/modules/core.py
@@ -43,6 +39,8 @@
 @dirrm share/x-tile/modules
 @dirrm share/x-tile/glade
 @dirrm share/x-tile
-@dirrmtry share/applications
-@dirrmtry lib/bonobo/servers
-@dirrmtry lib/bonobo
+@dirrm share/applications
+@dirrm lib/python2.6/site-packages
+@dirrm lib/python2.6
+@dirrm lib/bonobo/servers
+@dirrm lib/bonobo
diff -ruN /usr/ports/deskutils/x-tile/x-tile.txt /home/pedrogarcia/workspace/ports/x-tile/1.8.4/port/x-tile/x-tile.txt
--- /usr/ports/deskutils/x-tile/x-tile.txt	1969-12-31 21:00:00.000000000 -0300

+echo x - Makefile
+sed 's/^X//' >Makefile << 'b67911656ef5d18c4ae36cb6741b7965'
